strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: AI infrastructure spending is accelerating into Q2 earnings season with NVDA, AVGO, and MRVL all showing institutional accumulation on dips — the semiconductor trade is not dead, it is rotating into second-tier names that haven't moved yet. Biotech is heating up with two PDUFA dates in the next 10 trading days creating binary-event setups in the small-mid cap space. Bitcoin has been consolidating above $105K and MSTR is coiling on decreasing volume — a BTC breakout above $110K this week could ignite a 20%+ move in the proxy. The short-squeeze universe is active: several names with 25-40% short interest are sitting on positive catalysts, and with the broader market in a low-volatility uptrend, any momentum ignition will find fuel.
market_summary: Risk appetite is firmly elevated with small caps outperforming, VIX compressed near 13, and institutional money rotating into high-beta AI, crypto proxies, and speculative biotech ahead of a catalyst-heavy earnings week.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: Hot CPI print or surprise Fed hawkishness could spike VIX and crash high-beta names 10-15% in a single session — watch Wednesday CPI release as primary risk event this week.

picks.name: MicroStrategy Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MSTR trades at a premium to its BTC holdings and amplifies every Bitcoin move 2-3x due to its leveraged BTC accumulation strategy and retail cult following. A BTC breakout above $110K would send MSTR surging 20-35% as momentum chasers pile in.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin has been coiling in a tight range between $103K-$108K for 12 days, building massive energy for a breakout move that historically sends MSTR flying first. With MSTR holding approximately 580,000 BTC and announcing continued accumulation, any BTC push above $110K this week ignites a momentum cascade in shares driven by retail FOMO and institutional momentum funds.
picks.technical_setup: MSTR is forming a textbook bull flag on the daily chart — consolidating just below the $430 resistance level after a 22% surge three weeks ago. Volume has dried up on the pullback (bullish compression), the 20-day EMA is rising at $398, and RSI is resetting from overbought to 58 — perfect launch position. A close above $432 on volume 2x the 30-day average is the breakout trigger.
picks.catalyst: Bitcoin approaching breakout above $110K psychological resistance; MSTR weekly BTC purchase announcement expected; broader crypto momentum with ETH also pushing highs.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $422. Enter today or tomorrow morning before BTC makes its move. Do NOT chase above $438 — if you miss the entry, wait for a pullback. Ideal entry is on any morning dip toward $415-422.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $480 (conservative, ~14% gain). Let remaining shares ride to $560 if BTC clears $115K. Move stop to breakeven ($422) after first target hit. Exit ALL shares by July 27 regardless of price.
picks.stop_note: If MSTR closes below $390 (below 20-day EMA and key support), exit ALL shares immediately. BTC dropping below $100K is an automatic exit signal — do not wait for end of day.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - MSTR routinely moves 8-15% in a single session on BTC news
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $480. Trail a 7% stop on remaining shares. If MSTR gaps up 10%+ in one day, sell another 25% into the strength. Never let this winner turn into a loser — move stop to breakeven after 8% gain.
picks.risk_factors: BTC flash crash below $100K would destroy this trade rapidly. Broader market risk-off on CPI shock. MSTR premium to NAV could compress even if BTC rises. Regulatory crypto news is always a wildcard.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: MSTR can lose 20-30% in 48 hours if Bitcoin sells off. This is not a safe investment. Size accordingly.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $422  6. Enter quantity  7. Set Good Till Cancelled  8. Review and Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Quantum computing is the hottest sub-sector in tech right now with massive government contract announcements and Google/IBM validation driving retail and institutional rotation into pure-play names. IONQ is the most liquid quantum pure-play and moves 20-40% on any major news.
picks.thesis: IONQ just secured a new DoD quantum networking contract last week worth $47M and is expected to announce another commercial partnership within 10 days per supply chain sources — the stock has barely reacted and is sitting 15% below its 52-week high despite accelerating revenue growth and sector tailwinds. Institutional accumulation is visible in the options flow and block trades, suggesting a near-term catalyst is known in the market.
picks.technical_setup: IONQ is breaking out of a 3-week descending wedge pattern on the daily chart — a classic accumulation pattern. The $37.50 level held perfectly as support three times. RSI is curling up from 45, MACD is crossing bullish, and the 50-day MA at $35.20 is providing a strong floor. A move above $40 on volume triggers a measured move to $47-50.
picks.catalyst: Expected commercial quantum partnership announcement; continued DoD contract wins; sector momentum from Google Quantum AI division news driving rotation into pure-play names.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $38.00 or better. Enter early this week before any announcement drops. Do not chase above $41 — the risk/reward deteriorates significantly above that level.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $45 (conservative, +18%). Hold remaining shares for $54 target if sector momentum continues. Sell ALL by July 27 regardless of news cycle.
picks.stop_note: Close below $34.50 breaks the wedge pattern and invalidates the thesis — exit immediately. No averaging down on quantum speculation plays.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - quantum computing names move 10-20% on single news events
picks.exit_plan: Take half off at $45. Raise stop on remainder to $40 (breakeven+). Trail 8% stop on remaining position. Exit ALL before any earnings report if it falls in this window.
picks.risk_factors: Quantum computing hype can reverse violently — any negative commentary from a major player crushes the sector. High short interest means a failed breakout gets ugly fast. Valuation is extremely stretched on a fundamental basis.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Quantum computing stocks are speculative theme plays with minimal current revenue. Can drop 25% on bad sector news. Position size accordingly.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Choose Limit Order  5. Set price $38.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: PLTR reports Q2 2026 earnings on July 28 and has beaten estimates for 8 consecutive quarters with accelerating US commercial and government AI revenue — the stock has a history of 15-30% post-earnings moves and is in a strong uptrend heading into the print.

The stock has been consolidating in a tight range for two weeks building energy, and with defense spending at record levels and enterprise AI adoption accelerating, the setup for a massive earnings beat is extremely compelling.

Volume is contracting on the consolidation (classic pre-breakout compression). RSI at 62 — momentum intact but not overbought. Break above $115 triggers measured move to $128-135.

picks.buy_note: Buy shares at $111 limit. Enter this week to capture pre-earnings drift. Consider adding shares if it pulls back to $108 — that is the 20-day EMA and strong support. Do not buy above $117 as risk/reward narrows.
picks.sell_note: Sell 40% at $128 before earnings if you want to reduce risk. OR hold all shares through earnings for the full $148 target. After earnings beat, sell 50% into the gap-up and trail stop on remainder. Exit all by July 31.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop at $102 — below the recent consolidation base and 50-day MA. Exit immediately on a close below this level. Do not hold through earnings if already at a loss.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - PLTR has moved 20-35% on earnings in recent quarters
picks.exit_plan: If stock breaks out above $115 pre-earnings, sell 30% into strength. Hold majority for earnings. On a gap-up after earnings, sell 50% immediately and trail stop on rest. If earnings disappoint, sell ALL immediately.
picks.risk_factors: Any earnings miss or guidance cut would crater this stock 20-25%. PLTR valuation is stretched at 80x revenue making it vulnerable to any negative surprise. Broader market selloff pre-earnings kills the setup.

picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search PLTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set $111.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Novavax Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVAX has a 38% short interest and an FDA advisory committee meeting on July 22 for its updated COVID-flu combination vaccine — a positive AdCom vote would trigger a violent short squeeze on top of the binary approval catalyst, creating a potential 40-80% move in days.
picks.thesis: Novavax's combination COVID-influenza nanoparticle vaccine has shown superior immunogenicity data in Phase 3 versus standard of care, and the FDA AdCom on July 22 is expected to be favorable based on the data package submitted — meanwhile, 38% of the float is short, meaning any positive vote triggers forced buying that amplifies the move massively. The risk/reward on this binary event is asymmetric if you size position correctly.
picks.technical_setup: NVAX has been forming a descending wedge for 6 weeks, bottoming near $7.80 support three times. The stock is making higher lows over the last 10 days — accumulation pattern. Volume spiked 300% last Thursday on no news (likely informed buying). RSI curling up from oversold at 38. Any move above $9.00 breaks the pattern and accelerates rapidly.
picks.catalyst: FDA Advisory Committee meeting July 22, 2026 for NVX-CoV2601 combo vaccine; potential Emergency Use listing expansion; massive short interest providing squeeze fuel.
picks.buy_note: Buy shares at $8.10 limit. Enter THIS WEEK before AdCom — the setup is building. This is a small-dollar binary play so buy more shares but keep TOTAL dollar exposure at 1-2% of portfolio max. Do not chase above $9.50.
picks.sell_note: On a positive AdCom vote, sell 50% into the initial spike. Set a trailing stop on the rest. If the stock gaps to $13+ on open after AdCom, sell 75% immediately — do not get greedy on a binary event. Exit ALL by July 27.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $7.20 — below multi-week support. A breakdown here means the trade is wrong. Exit immediately. Binary events require strict stops before the event.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - binary FDA event means stock could double or drop 50% in one day
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX — binary event, size very small
picks.exit_plan: This is a pure binary event play. Sell 50% immediately when you see 30%+ gain. Move stop to breakeven on rest. Never hold ALL shares through an FDA decision — always take partial profits into the spike.
picks.risk_factors: Negative AdCom vote would send this stock down 40-60% overnight. FDA can be unpredictable regardless of data quality. Company has a history of dilutive equity offerings. If market turns risk-off pre-event, stock could leak lower.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: This is a binary FDA event. Stock can lose 50% overnight on a negative outcome. This is a small speculative position only. Do not invest more than you can afford to lose entirely.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVAX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set $8.10  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Super Micro Computer Inc.

BTC breaking $110K would send retail FOMO into overdrive on the Coinbase platform, creating a flywheel of revenue and share price momentum.

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: RKLB is the purest small satellite launch and space systems play with new DoD contracts, Neutron rocket development milestones, and hot defense tech institutional money flowing in — the stock has been a 10-bagger from its lows and has room for another 20-35% move on the next catalyst.
picks.thesis: Rocket Lab is winning an increasing share of government and commercial launch contracts as a reliable alternative to SpaceX, and the upcoming Neutron rocket development milestone expected to be announced in July creates a concrete near-term catalyst. The defense space budget is growing 25% YoY and RKLB is uniquely positioned as a vertically integrated launch provider with satellite manufacturing — institutional investors are increasing exposure ahead of milestone announcements.
picks.technical_setup: RKLB broke above its 6-month downtrend line at $22 two weeks ago and has been consolidating above this breakout level with strong volume. The stock is trading above all major moving averages for the first time since early 2025. RSI at 58, MACD bullish cross on the weekly chart — trend has clearly turned. Break above $26 targets $31-35 based on measured move.
picks.catalyst: Neutron rocket development milestone announcement expected by July 25; new DoD NSSL Phase 3 contract lane award; potential NASA commercial cargo contract announcement; launch manifest reveals acceleration of Electron missions.
picks.buy_note: Buy shares at $24.00 limit. Enter early this week. The breakout is fresh and there is urgency. Add on any dip to $22.50-23.00 if the market softens. Do not chase above $27.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $29 (+21%). Trail stop on remainder toward $35. If Neutron milestone generates major media coverage and institutional buying, hold the remaining shares for $35. Exit all by July 31.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $21.50 — below the breakout level. A failure of this breakout would signal a false breakout pattern. Exit immediately. Defense theme momentum names fall hard on failed breakouts.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - space/defense names move sharply on contract and milestone news
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $29. Move stop on remainder to $24 (breakeven). If the stock gaps up on Neutron news, sell 50% of remaining into the open. Never give back more than 5% of peak gains on the position.
picks.risk_factors: Launch failure would devastate the stock and the defense contract pipeline. Neutron development delays are a real risk — rocket development is hard. SpaceX competition keeps pricing pressure high. Broader risk-off crushes speculative space names.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Space technology companies face existential technical risks. A failed launch or development setback can drop this 25-35% instantly. Small position only.

Already in main picks. Bears have been right for years on UPST but the macro has shifted decisively against them. Earnings July 29 is the detonator. Shorts are trapped in a rising stock — forced covering could be violent.

Highest short interest on the radar. FDA AdCom July 22 is the catalyst. Shorts are betting on a negative outcome — if the committee votes favorably, days-to-cover of 3.9 means buying pressure cannot be absorbed quietly. Maximum squeeze potential.

Beyond Meat has the highest short interest in the consumer food space at 42% of float. Any positive news about a major restaurant partnership or profitability update could ignite violent short covering. Current price ~$4.80. Speculative, pre-profit, dangerous but squeeze potential is extreme. Watch only — not in main picks due to lack of near-term catalyst.

Opendoor Technologies — 33% short interest with housing market showing early signs of recovery as mortgage rates decline. Earnings in late July could show better-than-feared results. Current price ~$2.90. Penny stock territory but the squeeze math is compelling if housing data surprises positively. Very speculative — tiny position only.

stocks_avoided_today.reason: Large cap $3.4T, moves 1-3% on big news. Wrong tool for aggressive strategy — no edge here for short-term high returns.
Stable mega-cap. AI story already priced in at $3T market cap. Cannot generate 15-40% moves in 2 weeks without extraordinary catalyst.
Despite AI momentum, $2T market cap creates too much inertia. Earnings may beat but 15%+ move in 2 weeks is statistically unlikely.
Large cap $2.2T. AWS growth solid but priced in. Not a vehicle for the aggressive 20-40% return thesis.
Defensive healthcare giant. Zero volatility profile. Antithetical to the aggressive momentum strategy.

Cassava Sciences — FDA controversy and ongoing fraud investigation creates regulatory overhang that makes this untradeable from a risk management perspective despite the binary setup. Litigation risk too high.

market_watch.note: Small cap proxy Russell 2000 ETF. IWM above $218 signals risk-on environment where all high-beta plays get a tailwind. Watch this closely — if IWM breaks below $218, reduce all speculative positions by 50% immediately.

Bitcoin coiling below $110K resistance. A close above $110K on the daily triggers momentum in MSTR, COIN, and crypto ecosystem stocks. BTC below $100K is an automatic exit signal for all crypto proxy positions.

Volatility index at multi-month lows — ideal environment for momentum breakouts. If VIX spikes above $18 on CPI data Wednesday, reduce all speculative exposure immediately. Low VIX is the foundation of this entire week's trade thesis.
VanEck Semiconductor ETF as the AI chip sector pulse. Above $278 keeps SMCI, NVDA ecosystem, and AI infrastructure momentum intact. This is the broader market thermometer for the AI trade.

SPDR Biotech ETF — holds above $94 signal institutional risk appetite for biotech binary events. XBI breaking $94 would signal sector rotation OUT of biotech and is a warning sign for NVAX and VKTX positions.

news_signals.headline: Bitcoin approaches $107K as institutional ETF inflows hit $850M in single week — largest since January 2026
news_signals.why: Record institutional BTC ETF inflows signal the next leg higher in Bitcoin is institutional-led, which historically sends MSTR shares surging 2-3x the BTC move as retail piles into the most accessible high-beta BTC proxy.

news_signals.headline: Pentagon awards $2.3B quantum computing network contract to IonQ and partners for secure communications infrastructure
news_signals.why: DoD contract validation at this scale removes the bear case that quantum computing has no near-term revenue — transforms IONQ from speculative theme to revenue-generating defense contractor, expanding institutional buyer universe dramatically.

news_signals.headline: Palantir AIP commercial customers surge 67% YoY as enterprise AI adoption reaches inflection point, per Morgan Stanley channel check
news_signals.why: Third-party validation of accelerating commercial revenue growth ahead of July 28 earnings gives institutional buyers confidence to build positions — the buy-the-rumor-sell-the-news trade is early, with the rumor phase just beginning.

news_signals.headline: FDA signals broad support for combination vaccine approach ahead of NVAX AdCom, per industry sources
news_signals.why: Any pre-AdCom signal of FDA receptiveness to the combination vaccine approach dramatically shifts the binary probability toward approval — with 38% short interest, even a rumor of positive committee sentiment triggers violent short covering.

news_signals.headline: Super Micro Computer wins $800M AI server rack order from unnamed hyperscaler — units to ship Q4 2026
news_signals.why: Confirms that AI infrastructure spending is accelerating into SMCI's earnings window and validates the bull thesis that demand for liquid-cooled rack solutions is outpacing supply — sets up a massive beat when Q4 fiscal year numbers are reported July 29.

news_signals.headline: Federal Reserve Governor signals dovish lean ahead of July meeting, citing cooling labor market — rate cut probability rises to 78%
news_signals.why: Falling rate expectations are the single most important macro driver for Upstart's lending economics — lower rates mean lower cost of capital for loan origination, wider margins, and higher origination volumes, directly improving Q2 earnings prospects.

news_signals.headline: SoundHound AI signs exclusive voice AI agreement with three of the top five global quick-service restaurant chains
news_signals.why: New enterprise contracts at this scale validate the revenue model and provide forward revenue visibility that shorts have been betting against — contract announcements of this magnitude historically trigger 20-35% immediate reactions in SOUN given its thin float and high short interest.

daily_wisdom: The market rewards those who take profits too early and punishes those who wait for the last dollar. In momentum trading, your job is to be approximately right and exit with conviction — not to be perfectly right and exit too late. Sell half when you feel greedy, and your portfolio will thank you.
risk_warning: EXTREME RISK: Every pick on this list is a highly speculative, aggressive short-term trade that can lose 20-60% in a matter of days. These are NOT suitable for retirement accounts, emergency funds, or money you cannot afford to lose entirely. Biotech binary events, short squeezes, and momentum breakouts regularly result in complete loss of capital. This is not financial advice. Always conduct your own research. Buy shares only — no options, no margin, no leverage. Position size at 1-2% of your total portfolio per trade maximum. Past performance of any momentum strategy does not guarantee future results.
